description: Shared Renovate preset for the Gravixar fleet (gravixar-sv). One place to tune dependency automation for every repo. Public repo so BOTH public and private consumers can resolve it. Consume with: { "extends": ["github>gravixar-sv/renovate-config"] }.

packageRules.description: @gravixar-sv/core is published to a private registry that Renovate's public lookup cannot resolve; its versioning is managed outside Renovate. Disable to remove the fleet-wide no-result warning.
